tiers.name: Custom & Modular Exhibition Stands
tiers.description: Duration: Flexible, based on project scope
features: Fully tailored designs to match your brand identity and event requirements
Modular systems for multi-event reuse, reducing cost per show by 30–50%
In-house fabrication, international logistics, and on-site installation included

tiers.name: 3D Design & Visualization
features: Photorealistic 3D renders reviewed with your team before production begins
Multiple revision rounds until full client sign-off on structure and graphics
Available as a standalone service or included in full turnkey build packages
